AI Phone Answering

AI-Driven Phone Answering That Handles Calls Around the Clock

Sophiie sounds just like a real person—and in many cases, better! She's friendly, professional, and always ready to answer your calls.

Learn More

Meet Sophiie, Your 24 / 7 AI Receptionist

Sophiie is here to revolutionise the way your business handles phone calls. Whether you're on the tools, in a meeting, or simply need an extra hand, Sophiie steps in to answer every call with professionalism and care.

What Can Sophiie Do for You?

Friendly Greetings

Sophiie greets every caller with a customised script that reflects your brand's tone and personality.

Lead Capturing Pro

She gathers essential details from callers, like names, contact info, and service needs, so you never miss an opportunity.

Efficient Call Handling

Whether it's booking appointments, answering FAQs, or taking messages, Sophiie gets it done without breaking a sweat.

Real-Time Call Summaries

She sends detailed summaries straight to your inbox or CRM, so you always know what's happening.

Ready to Meet Sophiie?

Meet your AI Office Manager—designed to keep your business running smoothly while you stay focused on the big picture. From managing enquiries and bookings to keeping your team and customers in sync, Sophiie does it all.

Learn More

Industries That Love Sophiie

AI Solutions for Tradies in Australia

For tradies on the go, Sophiie ensures every job enquiry is captured.

AI Solutions in Medical & Healthcare Industry

From booking patient appointments to answering common queries, Sophiie keeps things running smoothly.

AI Solutions in Professional Services Industry

Lawyers, consultants, and accountants love her for her accuracy and professionalism.

AI Solutions in Financial Industry

Sophiie manages client calls and ensures no financial question goes unanswered.

AI Solutions in Health & Wellness Industry

From gyms to massage therapists, Sophiie schedules appointments and answers customer inquiries.

AI Solutions in Automotive Industry

Sophiie manages bookings for repairs, servicing, and test drives.

AI Solutions in Technology & IT Industry

Sophiie fields customer support queries and schedules tech service calls.

Frequently asked questions

Find quick answers to common questions about Sophiie's AI phone answering.

Sophiie picks up calls instantly with a customised greeting, gathers caller details, and handles enquiries based on your business rules and knowledge base.
Yes. Sophiie can handle up to 10,000 simultaneous calls, so no customer ever gets a busy signal.
Absolutely. You can set custom greetings, call flows, FAQ responses, and escalation rules to match your brand.
Yes. Sophiie is available 24/7/365, ensuring your business never misses a call regardless of the time.
Yes. After every call, Sophiie sends detailed summaries via email, SMS, or directly to your CRM.
Yes. Sophiie identifies and filters spam calls so your team only deals with genuine enquiries.

Ready to Meet Sophiie?

Discover how Sophiie can transform the way you handle calls. Don't let another lead slip through the cracks—let Sophiie answer your calls with style and precision!
